This version is based on the current content of https://github.com/Xt-EHR/xt-ehr-common/tree/cleanup-for-final and changes regularly. See the Directory of published versions

For Quantity, Range and Ratio, result units of the measurement should be provided.</span><br style=\"font-style: italic\"/><span style=\"font-weight:bold; font-style: italic\">Slice: </span><span style=\"font-style: italic\">Unordered, Open by type:$this</span><table style=\"font-style: italic\" class=\"obligation grid\"><tr><td style=\"font-size: 11px\"><b>Obligations</b></td><td style=\"font-size: 11px\"><b>Actor</b></td></tr><tr><td style=\"font-size: 11px\"><b>SHALL</b>:<a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/extensions/5.2.0/CodeSystem-obligation.html#obligation-able-to-populate\" title=\"Obligation Codes: be able to populate\">able-to-populate</a></td><td style=\"font-size: 11px; fhir:path [ fhir:v "EHDSLaboratoryObservation.result.value[x]" ] ;
fhir:slicing [
        ( fhir:discriminator [
fhir:type [ fhir:v "type" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "$this" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:ordered [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:rules [ fhir:v "closed" ]       ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Observation result value according to the type of observation. Model covers only most frequently used data types but other data types can be used as well.\n    Text result value should be used only if coded result value is not expected otherwise use valueCodeableConcept.text. For Quantity, Range and Ratio, result units of the measurement should be provided." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Observation result value according to the type of observation. Model covers only most frequently used data types but other data types can be used as well.\n    Text result value should be used only if coded result value is not expected otherwise use valueCodeableConcept.text. For Quantity, Range and Ratio, result units of the measurement should be provided." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [

fhir:code [

fhir:l fhir:CodeableConcept         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:binding [
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "preferred" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "UCUM for units, SNOMED CT for coded results" ]       ]     ] [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "EHDSLaboratoryObservation.referenceRange.appliesTo" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Codes to indicate the target population this reference range applies to." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Codes to indicate the target population this reference range applies to. For example, a reference range may be based on the normal population or a particular sex or race. Multiple appliesTo are interpreted as an \\\"AND\\\" of the target populations." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Multiple appliesTo are interpreted as an \"AND\" of the target populations." ] ;

fhir:ordered [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:rules [ fhir:v "closed" ]       ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Observation result value according to the type of observation. Model covers only most frequently used data types but other data types can be used as well.\n      Text result value should be used only if coded result value is not expected otherwise use valueCodeableConcept.text. For Quantity, Range and Ratio, result units of the measurement should be provided." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Observation result value according to the type of observation. Model covers only most frequently used data types but other data types can be used as well.\n      Text result value should be used only if coded result value is not expected otherwise use valueCodeableConcept.text. fhir:v "EHR systems SHALL support correct processing of this information especially when comparing result values from different sources and SHOULD indicate this information in the UI."           ]         ] [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/snapshot-source"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/snapshot-source>           ] ;

a fhir:Canonical ;

fhir:l <http://www.xt-ehr.eu/fhir/models/StructureDefinition/EHDSLaboratoryObservationObligations?version=1.0.0>           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/obligation"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/obligation>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "EHDSLaboratoryObservation.calibrator" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Information about which reference material or calibrator of higher order the laboratory has been used for the measurement to indicate the metrological traceability chain." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Information about which reference material or calibrator of higher order the laboratory has been used for the measurement to indicate the metrological traceability chain." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;

fhir:l fhir:Identifier         ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "EHDSLaboratoryObservation.accreditationStatus" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Accreditation status of the laboratory for the observation." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Accreditation status of the laboratory for the observation." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "EHDSLaboratoryObservation.pointOfCareTest" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Examination performed near or at the site of a patient." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates if the observation is a point-of-care test (POCT), i.e. an examination performed near or at the site of a patient." ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "Period"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Period         ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "EHDSLaboratoryObservation.type" ] ;
      ( fhir:extension [
        ( fhir:extension [

fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:code           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:Code ;

fhir:url [
fhir:v "documentation"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:documentation           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:Markdown ;

fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/obligation"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/obligation>         ]       ] [

fhir:l <https://www.xt-ehr.eu/specifications/fhir/actor-consumer>           ]         ] [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "documentation"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:documentation           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:Markdown ;
fhir:v "Observation type is a mandatory element. EHR system SHALL display observation  type. The type carries the correct semantic meaning of the observation. i.e. code and display name. Any valid CodeableConcept SHALL be accepted."           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/obligation"^^xsd:anyURI ;

fhir:url [
fhir:v "documentation"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:documentation           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:Markdown ;

fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/obligation"^^xsd:anyURI ;
